programme.title: Munsters 224
programme.desc: Munsters 224

programme.title: Addams Family 102
programme.desc: Addams Family 102

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Love Boat

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Clarence the cross-eyed lion normally a gentle soul starts acting oddly after receiving a blow to the head in a jeep accident becoming edgy hard to control and growling at everybody Dr Tracy suspects that the blow has given Clarence amnesia a diagnosis seemingly confirmed when Clarence suddenly takes a nasty swipe at Paula

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Marital suspicions lead a woman to accidentally kill her husband but when his debt-ridden brother tries to step into his place the Harts blow his cover and the widow may take her own revenge

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Chris and Mary Beth are delighted when they catch a major case and get to work for an attractive captain but Chris takes issue with the captains advances towards her

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky and Hutch are assigned to escort the daughter of a crime boss from San Francisco to Los Angeles but a security leak has unleashed hordes of hit men that they must evade en route

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Archangel is held captive by a powerful arms dealer who needs information to complete the work on a highly advanced maneuvering system for fighter jets - Fortune Teller With the help from a psychic String and Dom endeavor to find their friend before its too late

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A native American doctor discovers a unique way to cure terminally ill patients but the price of the treatment is murder

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: While the girls are swimming in the water tower a bi-plane flies overhead The pilot distracted by the beautiful creatures he sees in the water tower crashes the plane by the railroad tracks next to the hotel As the injured pilot is unconscious the family manages to carry him up to the hotel

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Many people have come by to see Steves plane which is still sitting damaged where it crashed near the railroad tracks by the hotel One very interested party is Henry Sharp who actually owns the plane

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur lands in a Mexican jail and Mister Ed is the only crime witness that can help to set him free

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Eds mother is being used as a plow horse so he begs Wilbur to buy her at auction Carol is dead set against taking in another horse and Roger is dead set against Kay spending any of his money at the auction

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: He just wants to get out of town and skip college in his restored Ford Mustang and she will do anything at all to join a local sorority Omega Kappa Pi which proves to be her ultimate downfall

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy rock promoter tries to steal the money raised at a benefit concert when his conscience intervenes

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Farmer George is attracted to Mary Jo the nubile young woman who helps out with the chores The problem is shes in love with a scarecrow

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A model desperate for fame hooks up with a crazed fashion photographer

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Overbearing control freak Jeremy and his long-suffering wife Julie are a squabbling young rich couple who encounter unexpected trouble in the form of a scruffy biker and his pregnant girlfriend while embarking on a road trip to Sunnyvale Can a surprise journey through time enable the obsessive Jeremy to successfully avert a tragic disaster

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric jumps a train in his quest for Skorzeny He finds a band of hobos who are suspicious of him when one of their members has his throat slit while they sleep

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: When a werewolf murders some homeless kids Eric tracks it to a mall and finds a homeless girl living there He runs out of silver bullets and fashions a silver crossbow arrow slaying the werewolf Only to find that its the homeless girl

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: To apprehend a murderer who is supposedly killing in the name of God Nick must overcome his vampire fear of the cross

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into calling forth a bomber for study but it arrives with a complication - a German general familiar with Hogans style

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter Burkhalter finds out Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad

programme.title: Mchale 409
programme.desc: Mchale 409

programme.title: Mchale 405
programme.desc: Mchale 405

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Duke talks Gomer into taking a jeep to the airport

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer is a look-out for burglars robbing the base

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After somebody breaks into the supply hut everyone suspects that a killer may be on the island--except for the Skipper who thinks that it may be part of a voodoo curse

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper and Mr Howell compete for leadership on the island by being named President When the castaways cast their votes the result is surprising

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa sues the electric company for leaving a gate open on the property causing the death of his bull The company wants to settle but of course Grampa is sure he will win once he discovers that George is on the jury

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: 12-year-old Little Luke gets his first job as a paperboy but when it comes time to deposit his earnings in the family cookie jar general fund he chooses to spend the money on himself instead

programme.title: Smart 423
programme.desc: Smart 423

programme.title: Smart 424
programme.desc: Smart 424

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ helps a pregnant lady who has some very incriminating evidence against the evil sheriff Nathan McCandles on Christmas Eve

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gives away Ed to a prospective client in order to secure a home architecture job

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Eds having paternal feelings so he talks Wilbur into adopting a little pony as a son for him

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A chauffeur John Mills takes up with his employer Celeste Holm; an 8-year-old Keith Coogan blames himself when his parents Juliet Mills and David Hedison separate; Gopher Fred Grandy has a crush on a cover model Hayley Mills

programme.title: WKRP 223
programme.desc: WKRP 223

programme.title: WKRP 209
programme.desc: WKRP 209

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Tongues wag when a massage parlor opens up

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Taylor quits the football team after a bad breakup with his girlfriend Aimee

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: A girl Two Leaf knows comes to town to take care of some business Later shes killed with Two Leafs knife and he has scratches on his face that matches her hands Dan thinks hes being set up but Nelson has no choice but to take him in Later a television reporter is trying to paint Two Leaf as a danger to society Upon hearing this he breaks out of jail

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Freeway is chosen to star in a new dog food ad campaign but the creator has a secret ingredient and will kill to hide it

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Leslies cousin is about to be wed and has set her lustful sights on next-door Kirk for some passion in her life

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: An aging unfunny comic who is an old friend of Dicks uses the Stratford to jump start his career despite Joannas objections

programme.title: Major 124
programme.desc: Major 124

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An impostor posing as Mr Howell claims to having been rescued and begins selling off Mr Howells stocks The real Mr Howell offers his fellow castaways a hefty reward to get him off the island and save his fortune

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Rene and RJ OGill two step-children of a recently widowed man hire Mitch to protect them for they suspect that their step-father Robert Houston murdered their mother for her money Both Rene and RJ will inherit a trust fund on Renes 25th birthday which is only a week away

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Koenig convinces Helena and Maya that their supposed rescuers from earth are really hostile aliens who want a nuclear explosion on Moonbase Alpha

programme.title: Highlander II The Quickening
programme.desc: In this sci-fifantasy sequel Connor MacLeod Christopher Lambert has become an elderly man after losing his immortality Living in a bleak future where the world is protected from solar radiation by a massive shield MacLeod regains his youth when he kills two assassins from his home planet This results in an ongoing battle with the villainous and powerful Gen Katana Michael Ironside but MacLeod receives help when the noble Juan Ramirez Sean Connery returns

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Family friend Swamp Molly asks Bo and Luke to deliver a load of moonshine but the shipment is really illegal firearms

programme.title: Hercules 207
programme.desc: Hercules 207

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: While examining Maels ship Liam and Renee find a chamber and in it are some life pods and the persons are all dead except for one He awakes and reveals himself to be from Ancient Rome and he was chosen by Mael to deal with the Taelons if they chose not heed Maels telling them not to come to Earth At the same Tathan decides to challenge Zoor for the right to lead the Synod and Zoor decides to get an advantage by using Sandoval

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A noted scientist and old friend of Suzannes Dr Erik Von Deer is being brain-washed through signals subliminally implanted in the music of his favorite artist into secretly working on a serum that will give the aliens immunity to Earths bacteria Suzanne arrives for a weekend visit while Von Deer is on the verge of the serums completion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A sickly stranger claiming to be Tressas long-lost brother appears at the Langford house

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim befriends a little girl with volatile behavior

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E01
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E01

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Stern religious people lease a Barkley farm When townspeople discover the newcomers are Mormons who practice plural marriage they plan to drive them out Jarrod hides the truth as he attempts to mediate the situation

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is called to Washington DC to take on a special task for the Army He is to take the place of married actorsingerdancer Jim Thornton Merritt who is working with two others to raise money to resurrect the Confederacy

programme.title: Young 120
programme.desc: Young 120

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Two Gunsmoke writers teamed on this modern-day Western set at a rodeo in San Franciscos Cow Palace A bronc rider dies in what appears to be an accident A rodeo clown looks around the scene after the police leave and discovers the riders rope -- which was cut almost halfway through before it broke leaving the bronc free to throw him The police come back to investigate the scene and before long the chief suspect is also murdered in another accident

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Briggs poses as an American tourist and subjects himself to a show trial in order to discredit a public prosecutor attempting to seize absolute power in his country

programme.desc: MAD try to stop Gadget from attending the International Congress of Policemen in London

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill flees to Earth in the wake of his failed coup

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill and Dr Braxis join forces to steal an experimental energy crystal

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and Flora sense Vantus presence again and Gillian also senses a great deal of power Vantu has captured the magic of the world and put it in a pyramid When he delivers Jayce to Saw Boss the power will be his to use without interference

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and Flora sense Vantus presence again and Gillian also senses a great deal of power Vantu has captured the magic of the world and put it in a pyramid When he delivers Jayce to Saw Boss the power will be his to use without interference

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM are on the hunt to find the missing part of the Emerald Arrowhead which will lead to an alien spacecraft the Star Chariot

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals the Book of Power which is the key to the Lost City of Mong Paco and its giant jewel-covered idol

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Lana is happy to be reunited with her long-lost brother Lyle on the distant video world of Tetris Kevin and Lyle join forces to stop Mother Brain from taking Tetriss power source the Sacred Square

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A football game against Dr Wilys robot masters brings acquaintances of Kevin from high school to Videoland The N team ought to play good and win because the prize is the throne of Videoland
